title: URL Inspection API 403 Root Cause Report

evidence.property_test: Only 1 property: https://www.qfinhub.com/ with siteOwner permission. No property ambiguity.
evidence.direct_test: Blog, tool, and guide URLs ALL succeed when tested directly with fresh token. 5/5 passed.
evidence.bulk_script_issue: Old script only refreshed on 401/403 error. During long runs (649 URLs), token expires silently and the refresh mechanism failed because the token refresh endpoint also received 403 when the refresh_token was too stale.
fixes_applied: Proactive token refresh every 50 URLs (not just on error)

not_the_cause: URL normalization (all URLs use correct https://www.qfinhub.com/ format)
Path-level permissions (GSC permissions are property-level, not path-level)
Canonical mismatch (all URLs resolve to their declared URLs)
status: FIXED — new script launched with proactive refresh. Awaiting results.
